creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Mon, October 29, 2007 6:48 pm, Jean-Francois Papineau wrote:
>

>>Environment:
>>Description:
> I have a Thinkpad A20m with a intel ethernet express pro 100 network card.
> I installed FreeBSD-5.4 and the fxp network driver does not attach. I
> think it is something to do with the bios or maybe some settings that I
> need to use. Also I tried some other linux distributions with the same
> results.
>>How-To-Repeat:
>

Can you report back a 'boot -v' output (this is during startup!) and a
'pciconf -vl' and reply-all to this email? (Make sure freebsd-gnats-submit
is in it so that we can trace the reponse).

Thanks in advance and thanks for using FreeBSD!

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
